title: elymus pseudonutans
intro: Elymus pseudonutans, also known as Chinese wild rye, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Elymus pseudonutans is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, gastrointestinal problems, and other health conditions.
